Video.summary: We are finally able to reveal the fascinating truths about ancient North America.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Civilizations of North America
Video.title: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Image.alt: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Video.summary: DNA evidence points to Asia as the origin of all human migration to North America.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Civilizations of North America
Video.title: The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Image.alt: The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Video.summary: Explore Clovis, the very first American culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Civilizations of North America
Video.title: Clovis Man: America's First Culture

Video.summary: Better understand why some Paleo-Indian groups developed hunting and gathering culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Civilizations of North America
Video.title: The Archaic Period: Diversity Begins

Video.summary: See how, peoples of North America developed corn agriculture, permanent houses and metallurgy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Civilizations of North America
Video.title: Late Archaic Innovations

Video.summary: While most North Americans were nomadic, see how a group of ancient people developed a planned community.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Civilizations of North America
Video.title: Poverty Point: North America's First City

Image.alt: Poverty Point: North America's First City
Poverty Point: North America's First City
Poverty Point: North America's First City

Video.summary: Dr. Barnhart takes you on a whirlwind tour of important places, civilizations, and events in Mesoamerica.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: The Maya, Aztecs, and Mesoamerica

Video.summary: Here, hear how the Olmec were discovered, and investigate three intriguing sites where they lived.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Civilization Emerges

Video.summary: Delve into Olmec art, searching for clues to who the Olmec were and what preoccupied these builders.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Art as the Mother Culture

Image.alt: Olmec Art as the Mother Culture
Olmec Art as the Mother Culture
Olmec Art as the Mother Culture

Video.summary: Investigate other cultures that thrived in Mesoamerica at the time of the Olmec.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Contemporaries

Video.summary: Grasp the diversity of early South American cultures.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Image.alt: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Video.summary: Explore the means of subsistence for Peru's coastal and inland valley cities.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities

Video.summary: Here, investigate the important Monte Verde site and its view into everyday life 15,000 years ago.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: South America's First People

Video.summary: Observe pivotal changes in northern Peruvian societies in 1800-900 B.C.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States

Video.summary: Learn about later religious iconography and artifacts at Chavin.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority

Image.alt: Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority
Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority
Chavín and the Rise of Religious Authority

Video.summary: Encounter the Salinar culture, a new settlement pattern showing no ceremonial architecture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War

Image.alt: Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War
Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War
Cupisnique to Salinar - Elite Rulers and War

Video.summary: The freedom fight did not end for Black Americans when President Lincoln issued the Emancipation Proclamation.
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins

Image.alt: Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins
Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins
Emancipation: The Fight for Rights Begins

Video.summary: As interpretations of Reconstruction tore things apart, far more sinister economic and social systems formed.
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction

Image.alt: The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction
The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction
The Promise and Betrayal of Reconstruction

Video.summary: How was the 'separate but equal' doctrine legitimized and enforced in the United States?
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow

Image.alt: Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow
Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow
Separate and Unequal: The Rise of Jim Crow

Video.summary: Discover how Black communities insulated themselves from the harsh realities of the early 20th century.
Video.grandparentTitle: African American History: From Emancipation through Jim Crow
Video.title: Lift Every Voice and Sing

Video.summary: Explore various settlements along the coast between the Chesapeake and Long Island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Traders in the Wilderness

Video.summary: Commercial success would have been impossible without cheap labor and slaves.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: An Economy of Slaves

Video.summary: Americans developed cultural forms in both music and art that were uniquely American.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: Printers, Painters, and Preachers

Video.summary: The stresses of Colonial life produced social eruptions aimed at regaining a sense of control.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States, 2nd Edition
Video.title: The Great Awakening

Video.summary: Contemplate the timeless appeal that makes France the world's most visited tourist destination.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: Point Zero: Charting Our Course

Video.summary: Mine the layers of history that reveal how Paris evolved from an ancient settlement to the capital of France.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: The Birth and Rise of Paris

Image.alt: The Birth and Rise of Paris
The Birth and Rise of Paris
The Birth and Rise of Paris

Video.summary: Discover the remarkable palace of Versailles as the self-contained world of Louis XIV.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: The Splendor of Versailles

Video.summary: Visit key locations in Paris where the French Revolution of 1789 unfolded.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: France through the Ages
Video.title: Paris in Revolution

Video.summary: Begin with a look at two iconic spots: the Rock of Cashel and the Guinness Brewery.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: A Destination like No Other

Video.summary: Investigate the origins of civilization in Ireland by visiting several ancient sites.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Prehistoric and Celtic Ireland

Video.summary: Visit important sites related to one of the greatest figures in Irish history: St. Patrick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Early Christian and Medieval Ireland

Video.summary: Explore the British-Irish divide, which is also a Catholic-Protestant divide.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Ireland and Northern Ireland
Video.title: Ireland during the Protestant Ascendancy
